english: I bow to Goddess Yamuna, daughter of the Sun, giver of merit
roman: Namami Yamunam Devim Surya putrim punyadam

english: The beloved of Krishna, Kalindi, remover of all fears
roman: Krishna priyam Kalindim tam sarva bhaya harinim

english: Following Krishna, full of Krishna, captivated by love of Krishna
I bow to Goddess Yamuna, destroyer of all sins
roman: Namami Yamuna Devim sarva papa pranashinim

english: Mathura and Vrindavan — attended by sacred pilgrimage sites
roman: Mathuram cha Vrindaavanam punya tirtha samanvitam

english: Born in the Kadamba groves, delightful through the deeds of Krishna
roman: Kadamba kana nodbhutam Krishna leela bhiraminim

english: Whoever reads this Yamuna Ashtakam at dawn with purity
roman: Yamunaa ashtakam idam yah pathet pratah sandhyam shuchihi

english: That person, freed from all sins, attains Vaikuntha
roman: Sarva papa vinirmukto Vaikuntham prapnuyaat narah
